name: Unifin Financiera, S. A. B. de C. V.
summary: Unifin Financiera, S. A. B. de C. V. operates as a leasing company in Mexico. The company operates through three segments: Leases, Factoring, and Others Loans. It provides leasing facilities for motor vehicles, such as cars, trucks, helicopters, aircrafts, and ships; and machinery and equipment, as well as the assets of various industries. The company also offers liquidity and financial solutions to customers by acquiring or discounting accounts receivables; and grants loans for the acquisition of new or used vehicles to individuals and legal entities, as well as provides lending services, including financing for the working capital needs and for the purchase of other capital assets. In addition, it acts as administrator for guarantee trusts; and involved in obtaining loans; guaranteeing obligations; and issuing, subscribing, accepting, endorsing, selling, discounting, and pledging all types of credits. Further, the company offers factoring services, such as factoring by direct collection and delegated collection; and vendor financing. It also provides personal, life, medical, money, theft, risk, property, car, truck, and technical coverage insurance products. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
